name: Ansh Madaan
education: B.Tech Computer Science, Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology (2023 - Present)

projects.name: Career Ops - AI-Powered Job Application Agent
projects.description: Built an end-to-end FastAPI job discovery platform aggregating opportunities from 40+ job portals with Gemini and Pydantic-based resume intelligence.

projects.name: EEG-based Schizophrenia Detection using Deep Learning
projects.description: Designed a hybrid CNN-LSTM with attention achieving 97% accuracy on clinical EEG data and visualized decisions with Grad-CAM.

projects.name: Voice Assisted Terminal
projects.description: Built a voice-controlled terminal translating natural language to shell commands using Google Generative AI, published on PyPI.

projects.name: Face Recognition-Based Chatbot Authentication System
projects.description: Engineered real-time face recognition authentication using OpenCV and integrated a TensorFlow NLP chatbot.
